The 2025 Cruise early spring collection reinterprets the classic Noé handbag, adding a new member to the Trunk family. Luxurious lambskin is embossed with Monogram pattern, while leather corners and drawstring closure continue the signature details. A detachable shoulder strap and braided chain allow for hand-carry or crossbody options.

This Pochette Accessoires bag features classic Monogram canvas blended with the bright Cherry Blossom pattern from Haruki Murakami, expressing the distinct elements of the Louis Vuitton x Haruki Murakami replica series with a playful style. Leather bows and the LV monogram lock light up the top, while eye-catching studs and a removable chain add a touch of rebelliousness.
